title: pip install fails - PyPI returns truncated JSON response for grpcio package index
primary_error: json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 79963 (char 79962)
context: pip was installing tensorflow from src/frontends/tensorflow/tests/requirements.txt and trying to resolve grpcio<2.0,>=1.24.3 dependency. The PyPI Simple API returned a truncated JSON response causing the pip resolver to fail with JSONDecodeError.
root_cause: Network-related: PyPI index returned a truncated/malformed JSON response when pip queried the grpcio package index page. This is transient and caused by a network error between the runner and PyPI CDN.
resolution: Re-run the workflow (already attempted as run_attempt 2). Consider adding retry logic for pip install steps or pinning grpcio version directly.
